title: Better than Bees
description: My humble attempt to recreate Better than Wolves in newer versions of Minecraft
body:
The purpose of this mod is to modernize everything which made Better than Wolves by FlowerChild so great and make it available for everyone to enjoy.

Original Better than Wolves mindset featured things that expanded upon vanilla experience with respects to the more classic Mojang design philosophy.

### Notice
This mod is WIP and currently in a very early stage of development.
